---
name: Contribution proposal
about: Propose a new skill, stack guide, registry MCP, or deployment recipe
labels: proposal
---

**Surface** (skill / stack guide / registry MCP / deploy recipe / hook / seed data)

**What it adds** (one paragraph — what does the agent do better with this?)

**Why it's the minimal version** (ponytail check: what did you deliberately NOT build?)

**Example** (a before/after of agent behavior, or the decision rules it encodes)
